review_body_text: Great to have experience working with Maybank. Knowledgeable and good benefit. Humanising employer to staff and family member. Very closed to community with cahaya kasih and charity day.

review_title: enjoying & no need to worries about pending task
review_body_text: The best call centre company that i has been working.MBB offer your with highly paid & good staff benefit & family.Management was pro active as they always create a lots of activities & event for staff to particpate.
Work as bankers can live in a safe place. Besides that, can develop and sharpen our skills in this bank. We learn many thinga here and also multitasking.

review_title: able to learn more and be productive on banking fields
review_body_text: worked in Maybank for less than a year , learnt many thing about the banking field . able to communicate with customer and provide customer service .
Opportunities to excel for your career advancement apparent. A very high learning culture and sales oriented environment. Attractive reward and employee benefits.

Opportunities are less given to juniors and senior does not want to help or guide junior in their task as they say they are to busy. Have to learn by own. No guidance when no guidance how to learn. Overall working colleagues are friendly.

I work at hq. So far the facilities are good. They provide gym, library, prayer room, food court etc. About work, the working hours also ok. Start working at 8.45 And end at 5.45. Need to make a call to customer and liaise with them about their card debit/ credit. Help them to activate the new card. I learned so many things here, with helpful colleagues I can learn and enhance my microsoft office skills.

Job Work/Life Balance- very good Compensation/Benefits - very good Job Security/Advancement - very good Management - good, they have very systematic management Job Culture - very good. happy working place
Hectic schedule and day to day target review. Competition within colleagues and cooperation within departments create competitive culture. Life is bending towards employee more than family.
cons_text: Life seems to cater within work than personal life

review_body_text: Stable company background, good brand on local & oversea. Having completed structure & clear visions. Easy to fullfill customer's needs with much branches on Malaysia.

Typical day at work are interesting. Could meet many people that we can learnt. Their management could be a guidances to other banks. Hardest part of job that i can share is when you cannot understand their work and you must hardworking to find and know or ask the other employee.

review_title: The most enjoyable part of the job
review_body_text: I have learned new thing through out this journey experience and it is also build my self confidence level to the maximum level. The environment of job working space also makes me feel excited to work there also get surrounding with positive employee.
Learn new things. Different challenges everyday. Enhance communication skill. Seniority. Explore new things. Need patience. Need to work hard since expectation too high.
Good career development for fresh graduate to gain their knowledge in banking sector. Interactive workplace with lots of activities such birthday celebration, portluck, futsal & badminton
cons_text: Have to work on weekend once in a month

review_body_text: The challenging and excellent working environment that makes me easier to gain more experiences and enhances skill from a senior executive and manager

review_title: Have a dinner good boss and great staff
review_body_text: Give customer a best service as a maybank moto Humanising. Assist customer to use ATM or CDM machine (make payment / transfer etc) Aswering call greet customer in proper way.

A very pressuring job. This is my first job after graduating. I haven't got any banking or insurance experience before, so it is really a challenge for me. Everyday i will be pressure by my boss that can lead me to feel very down & not confident at all.

I was only doing an internship but it was interesting as the manager and supervisor were helpful and guide throughout the process of assimilating in the workforce. I was able to work autonomously and able to meet client. Understanding how everything works.

review_title: Good experience with a good team work foundation
review_body_text: Working with this bank has develop me to become more organise and self sufficient. It has also made me to prioritize the importance of the task given and to multi task. With the well management and support from the company , it has enable me to work whiles making sure I have time for my family. With a well diverse country, I work alongside with many diversified colleagues and learned about the many cultures we have. The hardest part of my job would be at times due to the multi culture , I would have to put in extra hours during the festive time and working for a Country Head of the Bank , can be demanding at times. The best and most enjoyable part of the job is that I get to experience good food, great friends and fantastic opportunity to travel !
pros_text: Over time pay, Yearly Bonus, Humanity Rights, Medical, Insurance
cons_text: Long hours, Overload work, Lack of manpower

review_body_text: Challenging duty. Interest rate keep on changing without memo. Selected sales person are given the leads of a potential customet whilst the others are given the recycled leads.
